docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-16-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAR-07-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST ARJUN SINGH FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: APR-16-2003, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAY-01-2003. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR FEB-11-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
HEARING. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FEB-11-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY SUSAN K CROZIER. (212)
